cases.prompt_body: Open-sided launch tower service platform before dawn, one engineer proxy in a headset and weather jacket stands at a waist-high terminal facing outward, hands near the console but not gesturing theatrically, the Challenger external tank and one white booster remain visible through the steel behind him, small unreadable monitor glow, cold damp air, muted sodium work lights, no other workers, restrained documentary tension
